description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 57 mins. His work was mostly in Java, Bash, and Markdown. The data shows activity across 4 projects, but no public GitHub commits, repositories, or pull requests were recorded.
